metadata.title: Checkout latency and payment failure spike
metadata.summary: During the 14:05-14:20 window, checkout latency surged, payment retries increased, and checkout conversion fell sharply.

timeline.label: Healthy baseline
timeline.summary: Traffic is healthy. Checkout latency and conversion are within normal range.
timeline.operator_note: Open with the calm baseline so viewers can see the system before the incident emerges.

timeline.label: Latency warning
timeline.summary: The monitor starts seeing elevated checkout and payment latency, but user impact is still limited.
timeline.operator_note: Narrate that the Monitor Agent is the first to notice the anomaly trend.

timeline.label: Error spike
timeline.summary: Timeout errors begin clustering in payment-service while latency worsens across the checkout path.
timeline.operator_note: Switch to the agent trace panel here and show evidence being handed from Monitor to Investigator.

timeline.label: Cross-signal incident
timeline.summary: Now the system sees a multi-signal incident: latency, errors, slow traces, and checkout drop-off all align.
timeline.operator_note: This is a good point to explain why this is not just a log parser; it correlates ops and user impact.

timeline.label: Root-cause focus
timeline.summary: The investigation narrows to Redis-backed payment session handling and recent retry/config changes.
timeline.operator_note: Pause on the hypotheses and inspection targets so the audience sees the investigation narrowing.
